hypothesis: Fine-tuning the pre-trained MACE/NequIP/ViSNet models with a differentiable JAX-MD loss that penalizes total-energy drift over 10–100 step NVE rollouts will reduce the median absolute energy drift per atom by at least 50% during 1 ns NVE simulations of 1UAO and 1ABT relative to models trained only on per-structure energy/force labels, while altering validation force MAE by less than 5%.
